comment: Das Apartment von Daniel ist sehr schön eingerichtet und mit Waschmaschiene, TV, W-Lan und gut ausgestateter Küche hat man alles was man braucht. Die Lage der Wohnung ist perfekt, da sie einerseits in einer ruhigen Gegend liegt andererseits sind es nur 200m bis zum nächsten Supermarkt und zum Zentrum mit Restaurantes und Bars. Die Wohnung war sauber und es gab frische Handtüscher und Bettwäsche. Daniel selbst ist sehr nett und war immer pünktlich. Er hat uns außerdem tolle Tips zu Stränden, Restaurants und Ausflügen gegeben. Alles in allem war es ein super Urlaub und wir würden jederzeit wieder kommen!

Estuvimos dos días en el apartamento de Dani y nos encanto todo! La zona (cerca del centro, en una zona tranquila, a 10 minutos en coche de varias playas chulas), la terraza, la decoración... hasta el olor de las sábanas (qué detergente usáis que huele genial jeje! ) Nos sentimos como en casa, tiene de todo y Dani muy amable, siempre pendiente y ajustándose a nuestros horarios. 100% recomendable!! Gracias por todo!

Hemos disfrutado del apartamento de Dani como si fuera nuestra casa.
La descripcion y las fotos son exactas a la realidad.
la sitaucion del pisdo es inmejorable, a pocos pasos de restaurantes y bares en el centro del pueblo y muy cerca de las playas.
Dani ha sido muy atento y ha estado pendiente de nosotros por si necesitabamos algo. 
Volveremos pronto.
gracias Dani y hasta la proxima
Appartamento in posizione tranquilla e comoda x raggiungere le spiagge.  Appartamento adatto a tre persone, la cucina andrebbe attrezzata con qualche accessorio in più!

Really lovely apartment! The most perfect balcony..! Daniel and Ester were helpful and the apartment was clean and nice. Nice area with short walk to beautiful beaches.
Thank you!

Wir haben das Apartment wie beschrieben vorgefunden. Bereits vor unserem Eintreffen hat sich Daniel zuvorkommend um uns gekümmert und uns Tipps für den Aufenthalt gesendet.
Das Apartment war sehr sauber und war mit allem ausgestattet, was wir für eine Woche benötigten, die Küche war voll ausgestattet und ermöglichte uns das Kochen zuhause.
Wir sind mit einem Baby gereist, dafür hat Daniel zusätzlich ein Baby-Bett zur Verfügung gestellt. Wir waren sehr glücklich mit dem Apartment und können Daniel sehr empfehlen.

The flat was awesome. Perfectly suited for the two of us seeing Mallorca for the first time. Great apartment, really clean, even had some beach toys we could borrow. Balcony was good for an evenings sundowner. Daniel was  a wonderful host, really communicative and helpful! Would definitely come here again.
private_feedback: Thanks Dani for an enjoyable stay. Good luck with your running! I might try again in a few months when my legs are better! :) graçias!

comment:
Daniel's apartment is adequately equipped with everything you need for a holiday: You can have breakfast on the balcony (sun in the morning), you can cook in a kitchen that has everything you need, you can relax on a sofa and watch tv or you can just go outside and hang out on one of the various nearby beaches. It's a five to ten minutes walk to some of the best beaches in Mallorca. 

We enjoyed staying at the apartment. Daniel was very helpful and took great care of us by sending us information and hints about the area and by staying in contact with us all the time. He answers your e-mails within minutes and is always there, if you have any kind of question. He's a wonderful host! 

Colonia de Sant Jordi is a rather small village. There's not much to do except for the beaches and the sea, but if you're into sports, it's a good "base" to stay. We did lots of cycling (with race bycicles), running (you can run close to the sea, starting from the harbour they've built a walkway made of timber planks) or swimming (there's an olympic pool in Colonia, two minutes from the apartment). 

Altogether, I can definitely recommend staying at Daniels place.

We had such a wonderful time in Daniel's apartment and in the surrounding area, we didn't want to come home! The apartment is exactly as pictured, and only a 5 minute walk from the beach on one side and the harbor on the other with delicious little water-front restaurants. We were also a 40 minute drive from the city of Palma which had so much to offer, although Colonia (where the apartment is) was a perfect hideaway for a long weekend. Daniel waited for us over an hour when our rental car took forever, gave us plenty of tips on places to visit and eat (which were right on point) and provided a clean, warm apartment ready for us to enjoy! I cannot say enough good things about this place. Don't bother to bring your sunscreen, beach towels, or cooler because Daniel provided it all for you :) Definitely a must-go!

Daniel ist ein wunderbarer Gastgeber. Eine Flasche Sekt, ein Strauß Blumen zum Empfang und, vor allem, ein sehr schönes Appartment! Die Küche ist sehr gut ausgestattet. Alles ist sehr sauber und mit viel Liebe eingerichtet. Daniel wäre auch während des Aufenthalts immer erreichbar gewesen - dies war aber nicht nötig. Man fühlt sich einfach sehr willkommen.  Wer einen ruhigen Urlaub auf Mallorca erleben möchte, sollte unbedingt hier Station machen. Absolut empfehlenswert.

Der Kontakt vorab mit Daniel war problemlos und freundlich, es gab für mich keine unbeantworteten Fragen.  Die Schlüsselübergabe erfolgte wie vorher vereinbart und entsprach ganz meinen Wünschen und meiner Ankunftszeit. Die Wohnung machte einen gepflegten und geschmackvollen Eindruck, ich wurde willkommen geheißen mit Blumen und einer kleinen Sektflasche.

Daniel and Ester were the perfect hosts-so helpful with their spot on tips and advice. Place is very clean and has everything one would need for a lovely holiday. Most beautiful beaches and great restaurants all within walking distance. Also can't beat fast wi-fi and washing machine (a must when going to the beach!!). Thank you so much for making our stay great! Daniel checked in with us periodically to make sure we were having a good time -so nice! Can't recommend Daniel's place enough!!!

My husband and I have just returned from a  wonderful 1 week holiday in Colonia St. Jordi staying at Daniel’s apartment. We arrived in Mallorca in the morning and met Daniel’s girlfriend, Ester, at the apartment at midday, as arranged. She gave us a key, and showed us around and gave us some helpful local information (Daniel had already sent me a very informative email anyway). When we arrived the apartment was still being prepared, but this was fine because we were early; the official check in time was not until 2pm, so we went to do some grocery shopping and returned later. We had a rental car and there was no problem at all with parking - plenty of free spaces on the road right outside the apartment.

The apartment was very clean and everything was as we expected; there was even a bottle of cava awaiting us which was completely unexpected, but a very nice gesture. The apartment is a good size for a couple, and probably also fine for a couple with a small child. The kitchen was equipped with all the basic essentials and there were plenty of clean towels, extra clean bedding and even beach towels, a cooler and beach umbrella for guests to use! The apartment has been finished to a good standard and has been tastefully decorated.

The apartment has a lovely terrace where we ate breakfast every day and also a ‘breakfast bar’ type table inside. There is also AC in the living room/kitchen and also in the bedroom which I think is really important as even in early June it was very warm and quite humid in the evenings. The living room has a large TV and a comfortable sofa.

The local area is lovely and there are several different (very nice) beaches only a short 5-10 mins walk away. If you have a car, it is only a short drive to some of the best beaches in Mallorca. It is short walk (around 10 mins) to an area where there are quite a few bars and restaurants, but where the apartment is located you cannot hear any noise at all and it is very quiet and tranquil. The local area also felt very safe and I would not feel concerned at all walking around on my own in the evening. 

Overall, our experience of staying here was excellent. I would not hesitate to return and would certainly recommend Daniel’s apartment to anyone wanting to stay in this area of Mallorca.

Daniels Appartment ist für 2 Personen optimal aufgeteilt und wirklich mit allem ausgestattet, was man zur Selbstversorgung braucht, bis hin zum Sonnenschirm und Strandhandtüchern. Die Einrichtung ist modern, freundlich und geschmackvoll. Wir haben nichts vermisst und uns dort sehr wohl gefühlt. Die Lage in Colónia ist ideal: ruhig und doch zentral. Daniel war schon im Vorfeld äußerst hilfsbereit, mit vielen Tipps, und immer um unser Wohl besorgt. Die Betreuung könnte nicht besser sein. Absolut empfehlenswert!

We had such a lovely stay in Daniels apartment. It is beautifully equipped and close to everything, including a fantastic bakery where we bought our bread every morning. Daniel met us when we arrived, gave us great tips for beaches, restaurants and a day trip in the Serra de Tramuntana. He was very friendly and generous with his time.
We had hired a car which enabled us to expolre different beaches and more of the Island but if you are happy to stay locally then everything is within walking distance.

Can really recommend Daniels place.

The location, the apartment and the host was a very lucky choice. Daniel's girlfriend Esther was there to open the doors, gave some instructions and they welcomed me with fresh fruits, water and a cava...perfect. The apartment was like described, neighborhood good and save.
I didn't meet Daniel in person but from the beginning he was present on the phone, giving every needed information before I could ask. Very nice was the arrangement of the taxi transfer to the airport at the day I had to leave... would definetly return...

Me and my boyfriend really enjoyed our stay in Colònia de Sant Jordi. The apartment was everything promised in the pictures, modern and clean with air conditioning in both living room and bedroom - well needed when visiting Majorca in mid-July! The small apartment is perfect for two and came with clean sheets, beach- and shower towels, but I might have wished for a top mattress on the bed - other than that the apartment had all necessities including a laundry machine, which we appreciated as we had been travelling around Majorca for a few days.

Daniel was a perfect host, and though we never met he was very quick to respond both via e-mail and sms, and gave us many tips about beaches, restaurants and nice villages nearby. His girlfriend was very kind to wait for us when we were a bit late for check-in, gave us all necessary instructions and personal recommendations about the surrounding area. The apartment also came with fresh oranges, water and a bottle of cava which felt very welcoming. You could park for free just outside the apartment. There was a local Spar market on the same street just a few blocks away, and a bakery next door to it where we could buy freshly baked bread and croissants each morning.

Colònia de Sant Jordi was a very good starting point for exploring the south-east side of Majorca. You could easily access the local beach by foot, or take the car just a few minutes to explore white sandy beaches or beautiful coves with crystal clear water, great for snorkling. During the weekend, when the beaches got more crowded, we paid a visit to Palma which is about 45 minutes by car.

All in all, we had a great stay in the south of Majorca!
Daniel was a great host and helped out when needed. The apartment was just like pictured and we had an awesome time. Thx.

Hemos pasado una semanilla en casa de Daniel y hemos estado muy muy agusto! La casita es una monada con una terraza muy agradable. Esta todo muy arreglado y nuevo. El aire acondicionado es un punto muy a favor. La zona muy tranquila y cerca de las mejores playas de Mallorca.
Daniel muy buen anfitrión, siempre pendiente y aconsejándonos las mejores playas, pueblos, restaurantes,etc!
La recomendaría sin duda y repetiría seguro!

trotz der kleinen Größe ein schönes Apartment mit allen Dingen die man braucht. in unmittelbarer Nähe zum Strand und Supermarkt. Kommunikation verlief einwandfrei und freundlich .  ich empfehle diese Unterkunft uneingeschränkt.

Nous avons passé une semaine dans l'appartement de Daniel à la colonia avec notre petit garçon de 2 ans.
Les échanges avec Daniel ont été parfait ! Il répond très vite, il est venu en personne nous accueillir à l'appartement et est resté disponible jusqu'à la fin de notre séjour.
L'appartement quant à lui est totalement conforme à l'annonce. Il est beau, confortable, bien décoré et parfaitement équipé. L'emplacement quant à lui est parfait car il se trouve dans un quartier calme de la ville avec la plage et la rue principale a 5 minutes a pied. Nous avions également une voiture, aucun problème pour se garer dans la rue.

Pour résumer, nous recommandons sans hésitation Daniel et son appartement de la colonia.

We had a very nice time in Daniels apartment in Colonia. The beautiful beach "Es Trenc" is really very close. The apartment is nice, clean and equipped with important things you need. Supermarket is very close and Daniel is a friendly and good caring host, he provided us with a lot of information how to get to Colonia and everything was very uncomplicated and easy.

Apartamento tal y como se ve en las fotos. Ideal para una pareja. La localización es muy buena, frente a un tranquilo pinar, cerca de un supermercado y restaurantes y a un paseo del mar. Hay material de playa a disposición del inquilino, lo cual es estupendo: toallas, sombrillas, etc.
La comunicación con el anfitrión ha sido fluida y sin problemas, y aunque no nos hemos podido conocer personalmente agradecemos la disponibilidad y los consejos sobre sitios interesantes de la zona. 
¡Recomendable!

This is my second time staying at Daniel's place. I stayed at his flat last year as well- I  obviously love it! It's clean, accessible to glorious beaches, great wi-fi, kitchen, washing machine -everything one needs for a nice holiday. Daniel is a great host as well. Can't recommend enough! Many thanks and hope to return to paradise soon!

We had a wonderful stay at Daniel's place. The appartement was even nicer than expected. The balcony is perfect to have a nice breakfeast in the morning for a great start in the day!

Daniel is a very friendly host and he gave us great tips for nice beach days, delicious dining and over all good times! We definitely recommend Daniel as a host and staying here - it felt almost like home...

Daniel hat uns im Vorwege schon gute Infos/ Reisetipps für unseren Aufenthalt zur Verfügung gestellt. Auch bot er seine Hilfe für die Organisation weiterer Dinge an. Die Wohnung sieht genauso aus wie auf den Bildern, ist sauber und vor der Tür gibt es keine Park-Schwierigkeiten. Der Strand/ Hafen mit einer kleinen Promenade ist innerhalb von 5-7 Minuten zu Fuß erreichbar. Auch ein Supermarkt (SPAR) ist innerhalb von 4 Minuten zu Fuß zu erreichen. Man ist also nicht direkt mittendrin und hat trotzdem alles in der Nähe: Tolle Lage! Check-In und Check-Out sind reibungslos verlaufen. Während unseres Aufenthaltes war Daniel auch zwischendurch erreichbar. Wir hatten einen wundervollen 9-tägigen Urlaub dort und können die Wohnung nur empfehlen!

A fantastic flat in a great position on this beautiful island. We chose to swim and soak up the sun at the easy to walk to Dolc beach, clean clear water and 14€ umbrella sun beds. Daniel provides seats, brolly and towels if you choose to go to the more isolated beaches. Santanyi, Portocolom...all gorgeous. Great drive up west coast of the island to Soller, windy hairpin bends and breath taking. Also drove to Palma and took the old train up to port de Soller. Really recommend that. Colonia de san Jordi has loads of lovely bars and restaurants- particularly liked Es Dolc bar after the beach every day, Cassini beach house, Laos, the Indian! Great to cook at the flat too - everything you need is there. Comfy bed, awesome shower, good ACif you need it, perfect wifi, close to shop and sea, not overlooked. Highly recommend to you all! Thanks Daniel!

Both the apartment and the host, Daniel were great. I think the apartment was even better than the photos. It had everything we needed (including beach chairs/towels/umbrella/cooler!), was comfortable and in a good location. Only thing that would have made it more perfect was if it was right ON instead of near the beach. There are also many delicious restaurants and supermarkets right down the road. Es Trenc Beach is an easy walk too if you don't want to drive. Colonia beaches very nice - lots of families though, so if you prefer quieter/less children then go further. Daniel gave lots of suggestions about beaches, day trips and where to eat before we came. In my opinion he went above and beyond as a host. Before our stay in Colonia, we were staying near Playa de Palma with another couple, and Daniel helped us with getting tickets to an event. This apartment is a great beach stay and would recommend it for couples.

Daniel is a great host - very helpful and comitted in giving pleasure to his guests. He prepared some tipps and enabled the delivery of the key, even if we booked only one day in advance. 
The apartement was very clean and well appointed. I can totally recommend staying in Daniels apartement.

Daniel's apartment was very comfortable and clean, everything like in the description. The beaches nearby were amazing and other nice places on the island also easy to reach by car. We enjoyed our time there very much and would definitely stay there again. Highly recommended!

The apartment had everything you would need for a self catering holiday.clean comfy bed bath shower and nice balcony which unfortunately only gets the early morning sun but pleasant nonetheless.The Internet was as good as I have experienced on the island. 
The apartment is  close approx 30 min walk to lovely peacefull  sandy beaches -especially es carbo(to get there walk east along the coast from the port harbour)- 
There is  bike rental,boat and kayak etc Close by.Also tours to cabrera which we didn't take but was recommended by locals.
Perfect Base to explore the south East rent a car probably needed but if your a capable cyclist also possible,Cala figuera a very pictutesque fishing village and is a nice cycle ride away about one hour and you can buy some fish in the market there at 4.30 pm.
The town itself is nice to walk around the sea  and pick a spot to watch the sunset.
Campos or Santanyi have the bigger supermarkets.
The sun umbrellas,beach towels and beach chairs left by daniel were nice touch.
On coming home we were totally relaxed and fulfilled from our holiday in colonia de saint jordi and that's all we could have asked for.
Daniel was always on hand to reply to queries and had plenty of suggestions  and tips about the area.
private_feedback:
The apartment is  close to the beaches.
It was clean comfortable and close to town and port.
It was quiet despite being in a town. 
Daniel was always ready to answer questions if we needed him.
Big fridge and great oven and cooker

Have a smaller table on the balcony and the chairs on the balcony could be more comfortable maybe a small cushion might help and an ashtray for smokers.
An oven dish to bake and a tray to grill would also have been nice but not essential.
The shelf to the left hand side of the bed  is too low especially if you like to read in bed.
Maybe some local maps of the area,bike routes,bus timetables,a safe.

comment: We stayed with my husband for a week of Easter and enjoyed a lot! The place is amazing and is forever in our hearts! It is  a clean light flat located in a place which is close to the port, market and all the most interesting places of the city. We were also lucky to find the community of the abandoned cats and chickens close ' there was an amazing opportunity to take care of them and be close to our little brothers.. And I have to tell you, it creates also a very special bond with the place. We have to come back)))

Daniel is a really good host and gave us lots of tips about the area, and he answered questions very fast. The flat was very clean and had everything we needed. Towels, everything to cook your own tapas,... was there. We enjoyed having breakfast in the sun on the balcony very much! The area was very quiet and parking was no problem. We walked to the beaches on the left and on the right of colonia de sant jordi – all were pretty easy to reach. A perfect stay to relax and enjoy the sun!
private_feedback: Thanks for giving us the possibility to have a very good time in your flat! It would have been nice to meet you in person! As I already mentioned it would be good to give the guests a hint for the use of the balcony door, because it makes trouble for you and for the guests if it continues to break. Thanks a lot for all the tips and for the good communication – even though you were in Mexico. One thing I want to tell you: your neighbour left to your door (if you stand in front of the door outside) saw that we found the key below the carpet when we checked in. I don´t know if you know her/ trust her... I just think you should know about it. All the best! Karin

comment: Alle Vorredner haben recht- kleine, feine Unterkunft, alles prima und Daniel super nett. Der Ort ist klasse, wir waren zum biken und für Strand dort.
private_feedback: Mit Daniel war alles fein, die Wohnung ist sehr svhoen für zwei und es ist alles da was man braucht. Komme bestimmt gern wieder.

comment: A clean, neat, cozy and airy apartment containing the DIY-necessities for the stay.
private_feedback: The optimal host one can have who's keen on helping, guiding and caring.

comment:
Hi Daniel,
We waited a few days to comment on our stay in your apartment, because we wanted to think this over. 
We were not equally enthusiastic about your 'paradise' as you are. 

In hindsight we are really stunned by the reality after reading the reviews on the Airbnb website. 
We think your place needs to be refreshed urgently. 
We thought the kitchen was poorly decorated, even the basics are missing (we left a coffeefilter, thermos bottle and whisk behind together with oil, vinegar, salt and pepper) why not leave suchs things behind for the next couple to use?? 
The china and cutlery were not very clean, so we used only the necessary things. 

Your living room is compact but good.
However you don't have a decent chair to sit in. 
The sofa is dirty and old and it is comfortable for no more than 10 minutes. 
The chairs outside are okay for a quick breakfast or lunch but not to spend more than an hour in. 
The table on the terrace is so big, you can hardly move there.

The bathroom is okay, but the showen curtain is a nightmare (every time you take a shower it sticks to your body!!! ).
The bed is awfully hard, this resulted after several days in a more than painful back for the both of us. 
Perhaps this will be fine for young people, but not for us, people in their fifties and sixties. 
Furthermore when one person turns over or steps out of the bed the other one is awake!! 
The shelves above the bed were crooked it looked like they were about to fall down!! 
We changed the bed after one week, but we didm't use your wassing machine to clean the sheets because we couldn't find a place or facility to hang them to dry. 

It is a nice gestuurd to leave 2 beachchairs behind for people to use, but not when they are almost broken; however we used your umbrella. 

We think your apartment is okay (with a few adjustments) for youngsters who go out every day and evening and use your place only to sleep, shower and have breakfast.

Despite the fact that we haven't met, we were pleased with the attentive way you introduced yourself; gave us information about the village and region; and reacted at questions. 
We were also very pleased with the air conditioning and with the wifi in both rooms.

We would have wanted to give a more positieve review, but that would have been besides the truth.

Kind regards
Therese and Jeroen Tans

comment: Even if we didn´t meet Daniel in person because he was on a business trip, he organized everything perfect for our arrival and we were in contact the whole time. The flat was clean and nice, well located, supermarket and bakery nearby. Parking was easy and the beach is only 10 minutes away. The new air condition made our stay very comfortable. We would recommend Daniel as a host to other guestss!
Very clean and nice Apartment. Perfect for two. Well placed in the heart of Colonia. You can walk to the Restaurants, Shops and so on. I really recommend it.
private_feedback:
Hi Daniel

We really enjoyed your nice Apartment. It was perfect. 

Improvements:
It would be very great if there were some salt, pepper, oil etc. that could be used for cooking. Otherwise every guest has to buy it by his own.

comment: Sehr netter Kontakt zu Daniel , wir waren ständig in Kontakt , da Daniel wollte, dass es uns an nichts fehlt.es war alles vorhanden , Sonnenschirm , Badehandtücher und sogar Strandtücher. Wir haben einen tollen Urlaub verbracht und können uneingeschränkt diese Wohnung weiterempfehlen

Rent och fräscht boende passande för två personer. Skön säng, bra air condition (både i vardagsrum och i sovrum) och den basutrustning man behöver i en lägenhet finns. Känns som ett väldigt tryggt område. Lätt att hitta gratis parkering nära lägenheten. En bra bit att gå till bra stränder om man inte har bil. Bra att veta om man är ljudkänslig är att det rakt över vägen bor en familj med höns och tre tuppar som sätter igång och gal tidigt på morgonen. Bra kommunikation med seriös värd. Det var enkelt och bekvämt att bo här i 10 dagar som vi gjorde.
Loved staying in Daniels apartment. Was perfect for our stay in Mallorca, great communication and tips from Daniel we will return! Thanks so much
private_feedback: Thanks for the tips Daniel, great pad in a great location. We'll be back!

comment:
Appartamento luminoso, pulito, ben equipaggiato e in posizione comoda per raggiungere a piedi negozi e ristoranti. Nessun problema per parcheggiare in zona nonostante l'alta stagione.
Le migliori spiagge dell'isola sono a pochi minuti di auto o scooter da Colonia Sant Jordi.
private_feedback: Thanks for everything. We really felt at home.

comment: The flat is really nice, in a great location and within easy walking distance of the beach and restaurants. Daniel was also very helpful and forthcoming. My girlfriend and I had a fantastic stay and would happily stay there again.
Genial la casa , acorde a las fotos.  Daniel muy cordial y siempre en contacto con nosotros, nos brindó información útil sobre las playas. La ubicación inmejorable. Muchas gracias y hasta la próxima.
private_feedback: La sugerencia es la siguiente: tener a disposición de los huéspedes los elementos básicos de cocina como aceite , sal, azúcar es siempre muy agradecido. Por lo demás no tenemos mas que agradecerte.

comment:
Das Apartment liegt ruhig und doch in unmittelbarer Nähe zum Strand und Hafen von Colonia Sant Jordi. Direkt vorm Haus findet man immer einen Parkplatz.  Auch zur Straße mit einigen tollen Cafés und Restaurants läuft man nur wenige Minuten. Vom Balkon aus schaut man auf eine Grünfläche mit Pinien. Dort leben einige Katzen und Hühner, die morgens Bauernhof-Feeling haben aufkommen lassen. :)

Der Check-in und Check-Out war unkompliziert, obwohl wir sehr spät angereist sind. 

Die Wohnung ist sehr gepflegt und schön eingerichtet, wir haben uns sofort wohlgefühlt und würden einen Aufenthalt jederzeit weiterempfehlen. Wer gerne selber kocht wie wir, sollte evtl. an einige Gewürze und Essig/Öl denken bzw. im nahe gelegen Supermarkt kaufen. Ansonsten ist die Küche mit den wesentlichen Kochutensilien ausgestattet.
private_feedback: Hello Daniel, we had a very good time at your apartment. Thanks for the tips and the comfortable check-in and check-out. Have a nice day and maybe we'll come again.

comment:
Daniel, espero que hagáis tenido una agradable estancia, quedamos a vuestra disposición para un proximo viaje a Formentera
Gracias por confiar en nosotros
Joan
private_feedback:
Daniel, espero que hagáis tenido una agradable estancia, quedamos a vuestra disposición para un proximo viaje a Formentera
Gracias por confiar en nosotros
Joan

comment: Wir bedanken uns bei Daniel für die  Vermietung der Wohnung und fanden alles so vor wie beschrieben, bzw. auf den Fotos.Daniel haben wir nicht persönlich kennen gelernt, trotzdem war eine perfekte Kommunikation über Handy möglich. Er gab uns sehr viel Tips. Die Küche ist mit nötigsten ausgestattet und lud uns nicht sehr viel zum Kochen ein. Die Matratze ist relativ hart. Der Balkon ist sehr schön.
private_feedback: Ein Wasserkocher fehlte uns und eine Teekanne, die wir gekauft haben und dort ließen. Die Pfanne ist erneuerungsbedürftig. Die Matratze im Bett sehr hart. Sonst war alles ok. Vielen Dank für die Wohnung und die Auskünfte.

comment:
Ich will keine Lobeshymne singen, aber der Aufenthalt bei Daniel, war SUPER. Ich reise sehr oft mit AirBnB und habe schon vieles gesehen und kann mit Sicherheit sagen-Daniels Appartment ist sehr zu empfehlen.
Wer die Ruhe sucht ist hier richtig! Ich will keinen Trubbel und die Horde an Touristen sehen, deshalbe reise ich jedes Jahr im November nach Mallorca. Nicht zum ersten mal auch nach Colònia de Sant Jordi. Es liegt zentral, man kann viele wunderschöne Strände erreichen oder die besten Strände um Colonia einfach zu Fuß besuchen (links von der Wohnung 10-40 Min zum Strand von Hotel Marques oder es Trenc oder rechst 5-40 Min zum Strand d´es Port oder wunderschönen d´es Carbo. Bis nach Campos (Lidl, Aldi, Mercadona, Eroski, Organic Markt, Drogerie Müller usw. sind das 10-15 Min mit dem Auto). 
Die Kommunikation mit Daniel war schnell. Er war immer für mich zu erreichen. Und hat immerwieder nachgefragt, ob wir alles haben, was wir brauchen. Wir hätten ihn gerne persönlich kennengelernt!
Das Appartment hat tatsächlich alles, was man für den Aufenthalt braucht. Strandschirme und Matten sind sogar vorhanden. Eine Waschmaschine ist auch da. Die Aufteilung ist für 2 Personen perfekt. Das Bett ist bequem, man kann aber auch auf der Couch super gut schlafen. Die Küche ist mit allem ausgestattet, was man braucht. Wir konnten gut für uns kochen, es gibt aber auch gute Restaurants in Colonia (10-15 Min Spaziergang). Das Appartment liegt am Rande vor dem Pinien"wald/Stück" mit ausgebücksten Hünern und Hähnen, die täglich ihre Kräh-Runden machen (uns hat es nie gestört, im Gegenteil, zurück in Deutschland vermisse ich das ein wenig), Esel, Katzen...alles aber trotzdem ruhig und idylisch. Auf dem großen Ost-Balkon kann man morgens frühstücken. Alles in einem-ich würde noch mal in das Appartmen von Daniel reisen (auch gerne für einen längeren Aufenthalt). Sehr zu empfehlen. (p.s. die Leute, die nach "Fehlern" suchen-werden natürlich welche finden, aber dann sollen sie vielleich von vorn herein in das Hotel Marques einziehen :-)
Ich gebe 5 Sterne für das Rund-um-Packet bei Daniel!!!
Gracias :-)
private_feedback:
Thak you again for the great visit in Colonia!!!
I thought a bit about the suggestions for improvement. For us that was enough. But I can imagine that some do not feel the same like we are. Probably in the autumn-winter season... These are really 3 little things = 2 separate warm blankets (because a big one ist great maybe for a couple, but not for 2 singles+2-3 more on smaller towels and 1 couch blanket for a cold period (the girls need a cozy plaid :-)))). That's just a hint/tip not criticism!!! We felt very comfortable in the apartment. I was particularly attentive to the beach stuff. I will travel the next time without luggage, then that's a big advantage, if everything is available in the apartment. Thank you for the quick/great communicating with you. Was very good!!! All the best for you. Greetings Angelique

comment:
La estancia ha sido excelente, las fotos muestran correctamente la casa y me he sentido muy cómoda en ella. 
Hay utensilios de cocina, la limpieza es impecable y hay 2 grandes supermercados a escasos minutos, como también la playa paradisíaca que se encuentra a 3 minutos caminando. 
TV, wifi y una cama matrimonial muy cómoda.  Hay una lavadora y los accesorios de higiene en perfecto estado.
La casa es acogedora, cálida y tiene todo lo necesario para sentirse "como en casa". 
En cuanto a Daniel, debo decir que es una persona amable correcta y hospitalaria.  Ante cualquier duda no ha dudado en contestar y brindarse para lo que he necesitado. 

Lo recomiendo 100%.
Daniel ha sido un anfitrión muy atento, y nuestra estancia allí ha sido excelente.  Recomendamos al 100%100 hospedarse en su apartamento.  De nuevo, gracias por todo Daniel. Volveremos sin dudarlo!
private_feedback: Daniel, nuestra estancia ha sido excelente, muchas gracias por todo. Saludos para ti y tu familia.

comment: We  had a nice stay, the Apartment is cozy and clean. Daniel was very friendly, the communication and also the check-in and out was super easy. Nothing to complain about, would definitely come back :) thanks again for having us, Daniel :)

Wie waren sehr zufrieden mit dem Apartment. Es liegt in einer ruhigen Gegend, ist Ordentlich und das wichtigste ist vorhanden. Das einzige was uns gestört hat, war das der Wasserdruck beim Duschen sehr gering war. Aber das ist nur eine. Kleinigkeit.

We had a good time in Daniel's appartment. As we have a one year old son, we can not really recommend it for families although they have a high chair for kids but it is ideal for couples.
Daniel and Ester were both very kind and helped us a lot when there was a problem or something needed. They were always reachable and answered very fast. Colonia is a nice place to spend some days. The city and the beaches are very easy to reach by foot. We especially liked the Indian restaurant which we can highly recommend!
private_feedback:
Dear Daniel, 

Thanks for letting us Stay in your appartment. All in all, we had a good Time although we think it is Not suitable for a Family with Kids (i read it in one of your Reviews that it was suitable). I guess you have a cleaning Lady? We think it was a pitty that the appartment was Not as clean as we expected and as we have experienced so far with Airbnb. There were hair everywhere and it was quite dusty, specially in the corners or under the Sofa. We might just be so picky Because of our crawling son. We was Full of dust. There was also no handsoap left as mentioned in the Description. We washed the shower curtain Because it was so fithy. Don't worry- i wont mention it on the Public Review. We just collected Some Things that Could be better. So it is up to you of you want to improve or not: 

- Basics as Oli, vinegar, Herbs etc. should be there to use
- A kettle is missing
- A bin in the Bath room is missing
- A bigger Towel Hanger (or smaller towels)
- the water Does Not drain in the shower- it is Blocked!
- A vacuum cleaner is needed
- Something to Hang the Jackets when you come in 
- Maybe Put the Shoe Storage somewhere near the entrance (under table?)
- The shower curtain Needs a wash every once in a while- it was reddish, yellowish and just Filthy (we washed it in the Maschine and they Are white as they can be!)
- Mosquito nets can help reducing cooling Power. We did  have a Lot of Mosquitos although it was Not Hot. But Then we did Not dare to Open the windows. If there were nets, we would have Open and tend Not to control Temperature with the cooler. 
- The case Board was too close to the heads when you lyied down in bed, also they Are Not fixed properly. 
- Some Advices for the guest would be good, where to eat, what to find where (supermarket etc).

Nevertheless, Thank you for your effort and Time. Fabiani &
Family

comment:
De la réservation au départ, tout a été parfait ! Daniel est un excellent hôte, il répond rapidement aux messages, prend soin de bien répondre à toutes les questions, et prend également des nouvelles lors du séjour. L'appartement est moderne, propre, avec un grand balcon sans vis-à-vis, et peut largement accueillir 3 personnes. Il se situe dans un quartier calme, au deuxième étage d'une petite résidence, et est à à peine 5 minutes à pied du port, des commerces et des superbes plages. Si vous comptez donc passer quelques jours sur Colonía de Sant Jordi c'est à cette adresse que vous devez vous rendre ! 
Encore merci à vous Daniel pour votre hospitalité, nous disposions de tout se dont nous avions besoin :)
It was a pleasant stay at the apartment. Most useful things are included: shower, kitchen, washmachine. Shops and beaches are of walking distance 5 to 15 min.
private_feedback: The shelves next to the bed are mounted a little bit too low. It is easily possible to hit the head. It would be great to raise them a little bit up.

comment:
Daniel's apartment is lovely! Big enough for a couple, bright and surrounded by nature. Best part is the terrace directly connected to the living, special for breakfast!
The position is nice, the neighbor is quiet and you can easily reach different part of the island (by car).
Communication with Daniel is good, he sent us tips before and during our stay. 

I highly recommend it!

Colonia Sant Jordi é un paese adatto a persone che cercano relax e tranquillità. L'alloggio é situato a due minuti a piedi dalla via principale. Abbiamo trovato tutto l'occorrente (mancava però la carta igienica) e l'appartamento pulito. Inoltre c'è un piccolo terrazzo dove si può anche cenare. Piccola nota negativa, per chi dorme nel divano letto la mattina entra troppa luce e sole perché la stanza non ha serrande.
We get a lot of infis from Daniel about the place. Check in was no problem after 17:00. Kitchen have a fruitpress 👍 and enough for cooking. Wlan works well and nice beaches around the place.

Daniels Wohnung ist ideal für 2 Personen geeignet. Wir haben es sauber vorgefunden und es sah genauso aus wie auf den Fotos. Bettwäsche und Handtücher wurden ebenfalls gestellt.Daniel war ein sehr guter Gastgeber. Er hat sich zwischendurch auch erkundigt ob alles okay sei. Wir haben uns dort sehr wohl gefühlt. 
Die Lage war ebenfalls sehr gut. Man kann ganz bequem zu Fuß zum Strand laufen. In direkter Nähe befindet sich ein Spar-Markt und ein Bäcker. 

Wir können die Wohnung weiterempfehlen.
Apparemment très agréable et très bien situé.
This cozy flat is close to the city center and two amazing beaches. I would totally recommend.

Die Wohnung von Daniel ist für den Urlaub zu Zweit sehr gut geeignet. Die Einkaufsmöglichkeiten und der Weg zum Hafen sind leicht und schnell erreichbar. Auch die Strandnähe Es Trenc ist von Vorteil. Wir haben uns sehr gut erholt und können die Wohnung weiterempfehlen.
private_feedback: Daniel, der Aufenthalt in Coloni de Sant Jordi war für uns sehr erholsam, wir haben einen wunderbaren Urlaub verbracht! Vielen Dank dafür! Birgit und Manfred Speder

comment: Daniel es un host sumamente profesional, el departamento estaba impecable y equipado con todo lo necesario para nuestra estadía. La ubicación del apartamento es excelente, más que recomendable
private_feedback: Daniel ha sido un excelente host en todo momento, muy amable y atento con todo lo que le consultamos. Espero volver pronto!

comment:
Nous avons passé un super séjour.
L'appartement est proche de la plage es Dolç, des restaurants, du port.... vous pouvez faire les trajets à pied.
Il y a également la très belle plage Es Trenc à 5 min en voiture ( prévoyez d’y passer la journée : 7€ pour se garer en voiture).
40 minutes de l’aéroport de Palma.
L’appartement est idéalement situé afin de visiter plusieurs parties de l’île ce que nous avons fait (environ 1h30-2h des destinations comme Sóller, Far Capdepera...)
Daniel s’est assuré du bon déroulement de notre séjour durant la semaine et il était toujours disponible par téléphone.

Apartamento ideal para 2 personas. Con una terrazita muy agradable. Situado muy cerca de las mejores playas de Mallorca ( A tan solo 10 min en coche de la preciosa playa de Es Trenc). private_feedback: Gracias por todo Daniel! La ubicación ha sido genial muy cerca de las mejores playitas de Mallorca :)

comment:
We had a wonderful 4 nights at Daniel's place. Clean and comfortable, the balcony was fantastic to eat on! Restaurants in the area are good but not that special so we cooked our selves often. 
The area is really quiet. We enjoyed the feeling of staying in the little village (especially with that rooster crows). Beaches in walking distance. There was a cooler and the beach umbrella in the apartment so we could pack some lunch and go to a further beach where there were less people.
Daniel is very reliable. He always replies fast. Check-in/out was flexible and smooth. I can recommend the stay here and we can't wait to come back again soon!

El departamento de Daniel es confortable , limpio, luminoso y  muy bien provisto, inclusive con toallas para la playa y sombrilla. private_feedback: Hi Daniel, danke nochmal für den schönen Aufenthalt in deiner Wohnung! Mir hat es super gefallen und deine Tips bezüglich Restaurants und Ausflügen waren alle großartig! comment: We had a very nice and relaxed stay at Daniels apartment. It is located in a quiet area with a view into the Green. A supermarket, a bakery and the beaches of Colonia de Sant Jordi are in short walking distance. You can even walkt tot he beautiful beach Es Trenc in about 20 minutes. The Apartment was very clean and tidy. When we arrived and noticed the smell of freshly washed laundry, we immediately felt comfortable. Everything you need during your stay is available. We travelled with hand luggage and couldn’t bring that much stuff with us, so Daniel managed that we had an umbrella, beach towels and cooler at the appartment. He also made late Check- in and Check-out possible. All in one, we had a perfect holiday and hopefully will be back one time.

We've reached the Daniels apartment with no problems. Before, we've got all the necessary assistance and support from Daniel on how to get there. The apartment was clean, well equipped with home appliances, good internet connection. It has a balcony with the table and two chairs, where we've enjoyed our breakfast every morning. It is close located to the supermarket and to the great beaches and many restaurants (10..15 min. walk). We had a beautiful holiday at Colonia de Saint Jordi accompanied by sunny October (2nd week) weather. Thank you Daniel!
private_feedback: Die Bretter an der Wand über dem Bett im Schlaffzimmer waren etwas störend., ansonsten war alles ok.

comment: Wir waren für 9 Tage Ende Oktober in der Daniels Unterkunft und hatten eine super Zeit. Die Unterkunft ist gut ausgestattet. Sant Jordi ist ein wirklich schöner Ort und hat eigentlich alles was man braucht. Der Weg am Strand entlang zu weniger besuchten Stränden lohnt sich sehr. Im Ort gibt es gute Restaurants und zwei Einkaufsmöglichkeiten. Die Shops sind beide etwas teurer, sodass wir die größeren Einkäufe in Campos erledigt haben. The turquoise water and the twin beaches will make you fall in love with the island. The house is a jewel, tastefully decorated and above all very clean. If I return to Palma one day, I will return to this house!

comment: Lovely flat in a beautiful town.

Apartamento totalmente recomendable. Destacaría , la limpieza impecable, tiene de todo y está decorado con muy buen gusto,  la ubicación perfecta cerca el supermercado, zonas de salir y puedes ir andando a dos playas preciosas , de las mejores de toda la isla. El propietarios, Daniel, es encantador, te facilita todo tipo de comodidades, recomendaciones y está disponible en todo momento. Unas vacaciones 10!!!.Repería sin duda.

The stay at Daniels place was amazing! The apartment is clean and the location is awesome. It's quiet but still very central. You can get to the beach within a few minutes, as well as to the city center. If you need something, Daniel is always available via Whatsapp and no matter what, he will help you. It was really great to stay at your apartment, Daniel! Have a great time and until next time! ;-)

We really enjoyed our stay at Daniel‘s apartment. He gave us a lot of tips beforehand for beaches, restaurants etc. and the communication was really easy and fast. In the apartment, there are certain essentials such as toilet paper, spices, a Moka (Italian coffee maker —> get some coffee powder :)). It was very clean and we liked Colonia St. Jordi a lot because of many beautiful beaches and nice villages such as Ses Salines and Santanyi. The village itself offers a nice variety of restaurants, the close supermarket near by is a bit expensive so we went grocery shopping in Campos. We can really recommend this place, also because of the Smart TV and many free parking spots around the house.
private_feedback: Thanks for the great time, we will recommend it to our friends!

comment: Die Unterkunft von Daniel ist sehr sauber, zentral gelegen (5min fußläufig zum Strand) und mit allem ausgestattet, was eine Familie mit Kleinkind benötigt. Daniel hat uns sogar ein Kinderbett und Kinderstuhl organisiert. Die Kommunikation mit Daniel klappte jederzeit ohne Probleme. Wir würden Daniels Appartment jederzeit wieder buchen.
private_feedback:
Hi Daniel, thanks for having us the last days in Colonia Sant Jordi. We enjoyed it very much. We were very happy with the Appartement. 

I suggest to improve the bed in the sleeping room. The qualitiy of the bed falls in comparison to the rest of the Appartement.

Kind regards,
Patrick

comment: Le logement était propre et bien situé. Nous étions proches de la plage, des restaurants et des petits  commerces. Je vous conseil cet appartement assez proche de l’aéroport de Palma (40 min) et des petites criques magnifiques au sud de l’île.
private_feedback: Nous avons passé un très bon séjour je vous remercie pour la propreté du logement et pour votre disponibilité.   Encore merci !

comment:
El apartamento es muylindo, ubicado en una zona muy tranquila desde donde se puede llegar a todos los sitios de pie.
estaba muy limpio tambien.
sobre todo le agradezco mucho su rapidez en reaponder y x darnos muchas recomendaciones locales. playas casi privadas, restaurantes...
estuvo muy bien todo!!
private_feedback: muchas gracias por dejarnos ese depa tan bonito. en una ubicacion muy buena y muchismas gracias mas x tus recomendaciones. eran muy helpful.

comment:
Die Unterkunft war für uns als Ausgangspunkt die gesamte Insel zu erkunden.
Die Kommunikation hat einwandfrei funktioniert und Daniel hatte super Tipps für uns parat!
private_feedback: Thank you for the special tipps! We had a Great Time exploring Mallorca!

comment:
Estuvo todo increíble, sobre todo el lugar, muy cerca de unas playas preciosas y un pueblo muy acogedor. 
Lo único malo no dependía del apartamento, que fueron el canto de unos gallos que hay en frente que nos despertaron un par de veces a las 5 de la mañana. Por lo demás increíble
private_feedback:

Lo único malo no dependía del apartamento, que fueron el canto de unos gallos que hay en frente que nos despertaron un par de veces a las 5 de la mañana. Por lo demás increíble

comment:
We had a good time in Daniel‘s apartment. Everything is just as described and the apartment is equipped on a basic level with everything you need. The apartment is located in a quiet and nice neighborhood. 

We didn’t get to meet Daniel but communication with him was nice and easy.

Expect it to be very quiet in the apartment building, the neighborhood and around town when you go in November (as we did). We were the only people in the apartment building, the whole neighborhood seemed pretty empty and most restaurants in town were closed.

Car needed to reach the place. We went in the off season so we could park everywhere. Wild roosters were a surprise in the morning, that we got used to after day one. The apartment was wonderful, we had everything that we needed (towels, hair dryer) Tiny supermarket close by, otherwise 15 minutes by car. Wonderful beaches close by. Palma about 20 minutes away.

El alojamiento es bastante confortable, luminoso  buena ubicación a las playas.
Es una Colonia bien organizada limpia y acogedor.
El anfitrión Daniel, es una persona comprometida, buen comunicador.
Volvería,  yo lo recomiendo.
private_feedback: Buena tarde Daniel, mil gracias por habernos recibido en tu apto.  Nos sentimos muy a gusto,  la tranquilidad y la buena ubicación de la Colonia sant Jordi.

comment:
We really enjoyed the stay at Daniels place! It's a cozy place with everything you need and a sunny balcony in the morning. 
Daniel was a very kind host, had good tips for our stay in Colonia de Sant Jordi and kindly checked on our well-being during our stay.  
Thank you again and maybe until next time! :-)

Wir verbrachten im Juli 2020 unseren Urlaub im Appartement von Daniel in Colonia. Die Wohnung ist ruhig gelegen und das Parken war davor immer möglich. Man kann die Strände entweder links oder rechts fussläufig erreichen. Wir hatten ein Baby dabei und fanden es sehr praktisch schnell am Strand und wieder in der Wohnung zu sein. Den bekannten Strand Es Trenc kann man in ca. 30 min zu Fuß erreichen, einfach direkt am Stand lang gehen. 

Ein Spar ist in der Nähe, falls man etwas dringend benötigt. Sonst findet sich noch ein weiterer Supermarkt Eroski, dieser hat eine größere Auswahl zu bieten. Es gibt zahlreiche Restaurants im Ort.

Das Appartement hat uns gut gefallen, besonders schön waren die Abende auf dem Balkon. Es sind zahlreiche Handtücher vorhanden, auch für den Strand. Daniel hat uns einen Sonnenschirm und eine Kühlbox zur Verfügung gestellt, was sehr hilfreich war, da bei der Hitze ein Schatten am Strand sehr angenehm ist. Die Küche ist gut ausgestattet, und hat nichts gefehlt.

Die Lage von Colònia de Sant Jordi war perfekt, es gibt in der Nähe so viele tolle Strände. Wir haben den Markt in Santanyi besucht und können diesen weiter empfehlen. Bis nach Valldemossa in den Norden war es ca. eine Stunde Fahrt. Der Besuch ist auch empfehlenswert. 

Wir würden auf jeden Fall nochmal kommen, es hat uns sehr gut gefallen.
private_feedback:
Thank you so much for the great stay. Your appartement is very nice and we loved to sit on the balkony every evening. The balkony chairs are very comfortable. And thank you for the baby stuff, it was very helpful.
The Parasol was perfect, it's very good that you provided one, because most of tourists don't buy one extra for the stay. Small thing, but so important.  Unfortunately the parasol will break soon 😔

comment:
bel appartement situé tout près de la plage de Colonia de sant jordi, près des commerces. Très clair et propre et surtout climatiseur contre les grandes chaleurs!!!
appartement conforme aux photos et fonctionnel.
l'hôte très disponible et réactif. location vivement conseillée.
private_feedback:
mille mercis à vous, Daniel, super moments à Colonia dans votre charmant appartement
un petit conseil, cependant mais ce serait super si il y avait un peu d'huile, vinaigre, sel, poivre, sucre (peut-être, est-ce lié au covid-19?).
belle année à vous

comment: Schöne Wohnung direkt am Strand🏖 mit Klimaanlage! Tolle Kommunikation und tipps!
private_feedback: Schöne Wohnung direkt am Strand🏖 mit Klimaanlage! Tolle Kommunikation und tipps!

comment:
El trato de Daniel fue inmejorable.
Comunicación rápida, eficiente y amable. La casa genial! Muy buena ubicación y una gran terraza! Volveremos sin duda!! (Si el COVID nos lo permite)
private_feedback:
El trato de Daniel fue inmejorable.
Comunicación rápida, eficiente y amable. La casa genial! Muy buena ubicación y una gran terraza! Volveremos sin duda!! (Si el COVID nos lo permite)

comment: Daniel ha sido un anfitrión estupendo. Desde bien pronto al realizar la reserva nos aconsejó sobre la isla...lugares de interés, playas, consejos prácticos,...Y siempre accesible cuando necesitábamos preguntarle. La ubicación perfecta: alnlado de playas espectaculares, entorno natural, zona urbana tranquila, calmada pero con todos los servicios,...Y la casa con todo tipo de utensilios, ropa de cama, toallas de baño y de playa,...con aire a condicionado para las horas de más sol; y lo mejor, la agradable terraza dando a una pinada. Increíble. Un alojamiento perfecto. Si volvemos a Mallorca, seguro que repetimos en la casa de Daniel.
private_feedback: Daniel ha sido un anfitrión estupendo. Increíble. Un alojamiento perfecto. Si volvemos a Mallorca, seguro que repetimos en la casa de Daniel.

comment:
This place is perfect for your getaway! It was our first time in Mallorca, and we felt very welcomed by Daniel. He was super helpful via messages and offered many lovely suggestions :-) 

The place is located next to many incredible beach spots and some lovely restaurants. All walkable! Some other great beaches with just a 5-20 minute drive. There is a grocery store just 3 blocks away, too! 

The space is great, and cools off very quickly if you need air conditioning. Balcony was a nice added touch for some morning coffee and sun. 

If you rent a car, there are many spots right on the street in front of the steps to the apartment. 

Lots of refrigerator space, and he even left us a cool bottle of water for our arrival. Kitchen had all your cooking tools (despite a toaster like I’ve never seen before - ha! Made it work) Coffee makers too!

Tiny warning: there are roosters near by and they will give you a chorus to wake up. But if you’re like me, I loved it/made us chuckle and get our butts moving to go explore this incredible island! 

I will 100% stay here again on my next visit.
private_feedback: Hi, Daniel! Thank you for being such a great host! :-)  As I mentioned in the previous section, the ad included that there would be soap and such. The blanket thing was a bit of a surprise, as there’s one included in the photos. Also, I bought some basics for the apartment for cooking (salt, pepper, olive oil). These are normally included in an Airbnb stay. Otherwise, this place is absolute perfection :-)

comment:
Apartamento ideal para unos días de relax. Muy limpio y acogedor. Ubicación genial cerca de playas muy bonitas. Supermercados y restaurantes cerca. Daniel es un anfitrión muy amable y que está pendiente en todo momento.
¡Atardecer inmejorable!
private_feedback: Hemos estado muy agusto en el apartamento. ¡Sin duda volveremos!

comment: un apartamento muy recomendable, la limpieza excelente, al igual q el anfrition que estaba diaponible siempre q contactabamos con el, y la ubicación muy buena, sitio muy tranquilo y a dos pasos de la playa

Daniel's place was simple and exceptionally clean. The communication was excellent and Daniel was super accommodating in terms of check-out/in. The location is excellent, we could walk to both the small supermarket and bakery down the road which had everything we needed, and there are two lovely beaches walking distance as well as lots of restaurants to choose from. We were lucky enough to have a car and there are lots of beautiful beaches and towns around 5-20 mins away.
If you're looking of an absolutely no fuss and easy place to stay for a beach holiday Daniel's place is perfect and he was always checking in with out throughout our stay which especially during the pandemic was really reassuring,
Would definitely use it again!
Thanks Daniel!
Maravilloso alojamiento.
private_feedback: Todo de 10.

comment: wenn man es mag, das Hähne im sekundentakt von morgens 5.00 uhr bis abends um 21.00 Uhr krähen..

The apartment is very nice and neat. We enjoyed our stay a lot. We loved having breakfast on the spacious balcony in the morning sun. Every now and then we could hear chickens, that live somewhere in the neighborhood, which was amazing and for us, living in Berlin, this made our stay really complete, because it felt like being in the countryside. The apartment is only a short five min walk away from the supermarket, which is located in the same street. The Harbour and the beautiful Beach are also only 5 min away. At the Harbour you find nice restaurants and the beach is really nice, because it leads into a wild beach, the further you walk. So perfect combination of nice infrastructure and pure nature. 

Daniel was a great host. He arranged everything, so that we could have a check in late in the evening and he also came after our wish for a later check out. Very convenient and very friendly. During our stay Daniel was always availed and very caring. We could tell, the was really interested in letting us having a great holiday. Which we had. When we come back to Mallorca, we will definitely stay at Daniels place again.I highly recommend! 

Thank you Daniel!
private_feedback:
Hi Daniel, thank
You so much for letting us stay at your place, we really enjoyed Colonia and we appreciated the uncomplicated check in! We also liked the chickens, made us feel like being in the countryside. Really lovely.

comment: The apartment is really nice and above all clean! It's not far to the beach and a supermarket.
private_feedback:
Hey Daniel, 

We would like to thank you again. Your apartment is really very nice and we had two woderful weeks!

comment:
It is a very nice apartment , also nice for two people who don't want to sleep in the same room. The sofa is also comfortable.
The proximity to the beach is nice and also to the next Spar supermarket. 
The wild chickens , that live in the forest opposite,  are very nice to look  during the day, but at night they  annoyed us very much , because unfortunately, the roosters also crow at night.
Maybe it is only our problem.
private_feedback:
Danke ,dass wir in deinem schönen Appartment sein durften .
Da wir beide einen leichten Schlaf haben,  waren die Nachts krähenden Hähne leider ein echtes Problem.
Sonst war es sehr schön.
Lg

comment: Daniel ist sehr freundlich, antwortet schnell und ausführlich.  Er gibt einem Reisetipps  und ist interessiert an einem angenehmen  Aufenthalt.  Sehr praktisch war für uns der nahgelegene Supermarkt mit Bäcker und die zu Fuß erreichbaren Strände.
private_feedback:
Vielen Dank für die schnelle, freundliche und hilfreiche Kommunikation. 
Wir hatten eine schöne Zeit und empfehlen dich gerne weiter. In der Küche  war eine Tasse schon sehr abgeschlagen. Da es nur 2 Tassen gab, haben wir eine neue gekauft. 
 Liebe Grüße Werner und Susanne

comment:
We had a perfect stay at Daniel's place which was very clean and tidy and had everything we needed. For our son (20 months) old Daniel provided a high chair and a baby cot (with a mattress, which is not a given as we had to experience in other accodomations). 
We especially enjoyed to have several kids friendly beaches in walking distance.  Platja Es Dolc even had some nice snorkeling opportunities. Daniel was a perfect host and did respond very quickly.
private_feedback: Thanks again Daniel. I already texted you everything you should know.

comment: Le logement est situé dans un lieu calme, il est très bien équipé. De plus, Daniel est très réactif et bien veillant.

Nous avons passés un super sejour chez un super host ! Daniel est très disponible !
Appartement bien situé, à 1km d'une belle plage. Endroit calme, et en prime de beaux chants de coqs chaque matin ! :p Appartement qui as tout le confort pour un chouette sejour, proche d'un petit supermarché et des restaurants de la rue principale ainsi que du port. Tout se fait à pied facilement. Allez gouter les glaces de la Gelateria Colonia, elles sont delicieuses !
Bref nous conseillons vivement ce spot !
private_feedback: Thanks for all !

comment:
Great price/value, great and friendly Host. Daniel always answered our questions immediately. He made sure that we had everything we needed and provided us with a parasol and a cooling box for the beach. Check -in and check-out was flexible and easy. 
Beach, restaurants and shops are in short walking distance. Some people might be disturbed by the roosters near the apartment which are making sounds throughout day and night. For us, it was no big deal.
We recommend Daniels Apartment and would come back.

We enjoyed our stay in Colonia Sant Jordi and Daniels apartment very much.
The location of the apartment is awesome since you have many beautiful beaches in walking distance. 
The communication with Daniel and check-in was uncomplicated- he was very quick to answer and had lots of very nice recommendations for the area.
The apartment is quite simple but clean and serves the purpose of being the home base for great trips to beaches, etc. We really enjoyed the balcony for breakfast and were happy about the sun umbrella Daniel keeps in the apartment. 
As mentioned in previous posts: quite a few roosters are living across the street, so if you are a light sleeper bring some ear plugs. I am actually a light sleeper but was not bothered to much by it once you got used to it. Adds a very rustic feeling to it :)

All in all we really enjoyed our stay and would come back again.

Nous avons passé un très bon séjour chez Daniel, avec qui la communication a été très bonne .L’appartement est très bien situé, près de la plage ,des commerces ,des restaurants, on peut tout faire à pied. Nous ,nous avons pris un taxi pour faire l’aller retour de l’aéroport de palma et nous avons loué des vélos afin de circuler plus librement, c’est très sympa. L appartement est d un confort simple mais parfait : très bonne literie, climatisation, nous avions à notre disposition des serviettes de plages un parasol et une glacière avec glaçons dans le congélateur. Très bonne adresse à retenir.

The apartment was exactly as described and shown in the photos. Daniel was very nice and helpful and provided me with extensive information about the apartment and the region. He was always easy to reach for questions.
private_feedback: As I already wrote you, I was really happy with my stay. I will definitely come back :-)

comment: The location of the flat is good and calm, the restaurants are near. Daniel gave us tips for restaurants and beaches, great communication. thanks Daniel!
private_feedback: Everything was perfect, the location of the flat is good and calm, the restaurants are near. Great communication with Daniel who gave tips for restaurants and beaches. Thank you Daniel!

comment: Para mi éste apartamento no ha sido nada bueno.Daniel por telefeno ha sido atento y a solucionado algunos problemas caseros. El aire acondicionado de la habitación no funcionaba.

Extremely clean apartment (outstandingly clean and tidy, even small things such as new sponges and toilet brush) at a local neighborhood. Daniel was very responsive and gave replies immediately in case of any questions. Apartment is fully equipped, everything you would need is there. Thanks a lot for the pleasant stay.
private_feedback: Everything except for the daily extreme noise of the chickens (mostly from 04:30am onwards, sometimes from 01:00am) was fine, as I wrote already :)

comment: Loveley and clean appartment. Supermarket very closeby and in walking distance from the beach and city centre. Clear instructions from the host and easy to contact.
private_feedback:
Daniel,
We enjoyed our stay in your lovely appartment. We would definitely recommend it other people.
No suggestions whatsoever.
Bernd

comment:
Daniel was a great host. He responded quickly to all messages and was really accommodating when organising early check in/ late check out. 

Highly recommend staying at Daniel’s apartment and it’s a wonderful town.

Séjour très agréable, dans un 
« petit » port de pêche animé mais sans tourisme de masse. De très belles plages de sable accessibles à pied . Appartement très propre et confortable. Daniel est très disponible et de très bons conseils. A recommander !
private_feedback: Pasamos una estancia tal como nos gusta. Gracias por todo y te deseo resolver lo mas rapido posible el problema de los gallos ya que van multiplicandose ! Animo !

comment:
Das Apartment ist sehr schön, groß und sauber. Es ist alles vorhanden, was man braucht und sogar ein Herd mit Backofen. Die kleine Terrasse geht nach Osten, man kann dort herrlich im Sonnenaufgang frühstücken.
Leider ist die Lage nicht sehr schön. Direkt gegenüber sind freilebende Hühner, die den ganzen Tag, aber leider auch nachts krähen. Außerdem ist das nahegelegene "Sport Padel Colonia" durch seine sehr lauten abendlichen Veranstaltungen nervig.
Aber dafür kann Daniel nichts, man muss nur wissen, ob einen das stört oder nicht.
private_feedback:
Das Apartment ist sehr schön, sauber. Es ist alles vorhanden, was man braucht und sogar ein Herd mit Backofen. Die kleine Terrasse geht nach Osten, man kann dort herrlich im Sonnenaufgang frühstücken.

comment:
For November it was not the best part of Mallorca to stay. A lot of restaurants etc. were closed and baerly no people around. 

The appartement is okay. For us it was too cold in the appartement. Generally, we think it is not ideal for the winter period.

Wir hatten eine sehr schöne Zeit in Daniels Wohnung! 
Da wir zu zweit im November zu Besuch waren, hat das Wetter leider nicht mitgespielt, umso schöner war es Zeit in der gemütlichen Wohnung zu verbringen :) 
Klein aber fein, schöner Balkon und tolle, zuvorkommende Kommunikation mit Daniel.
Wir können die Unterkunft also nur Empfehlen!
Encantados. Piso ideal y muy bien equipado. En zona tranquila pero a 5 minutos a pie de las playas. Volveremos.
private_feedback: Encantados. El piso nos ha gustado mucho y agradecerte el trato y la disponibilidad con tan poca antelación.

comment: We spent the first 3 days on Mallorca with our one year old kid in Daniels apartment and had very relaxed quiet days. Parking outside, checking-in and the communication were really good. Daniel put a baby crib and a baby chair in for us which was a great help. We liked the short walk to the beach where we encountered mostly locals and the short drive to beautiful Es Trenc. Our kid liked the hen and rooster outside even if they were a bit loud early in the morning. Everything was working fine, including the heating that we needed because it still got cold in February. Nice and quiet and clean!
private_feedback: Hi Daniel thanks again for the crib and the chair, that was a big help. I did already wrote you that for the next season I invest in bigger pots and a few more knives etc. Because you do have some extras that are 1A like the orange squeezer machine. I also didn't like the smell in the bathroom that much and understand that the window has to be opened, but unfortunately we had two grey days and it got cold. So we needed quite some heating. Also it did get damp and wet inside. So I guess it's better suitable for warm days. And so close to the sea that's nice. All the best!

comment: I really enjoyed my stay in this cozy apartment with a nice balcony. It is very well equipped and the supermarket, restaurants and the beautiful beaches of the area are within walking distance. Daniel has been very welcoming, helpful and quick to answe to any requests. I hope to come back soon!
private_feedback: Thank you again for everything and I hope to come back soon!

comment: Apartamento completo para echar unos días en la isla. Daniel fue muy atento, tuvo varios detalles y ha equipado el apartamento muy bien. Una buena experiencia.
Süsses Apartment. Alles da was man braucht. Toller Host, der sich um alles kümmert und uns mit wertvollen Tipps versorgt hat. Die Lage ist perfekt zum Naturstrand Es Trenc.
private_feedback: Thank you for your Support!!!

comment: I highly recommend this apartment. It is a quiet getaway from home. The kitchen is fully equipped and the apartment is located close to the beach. Also, the cats, chickens, and roosters in the nearby area are an added plus! I would definitely stay again in the future.
private_feedback: Gracias por el alojamiento! Nuestra estancia hacido relajante y el apartamento esta bien equipada. Gracias!

comment: Das Appartement ist super! Wir haben dort zu zweit 3 Wochen verbracht und hatten eine großartige Zeit. In den ersten beiden Wochen haben wir im Apartment gearbeitet, was sowohl vom Platz als auch vom Internet super ging. Die Lage ist so, dass man auch an solchen Tagen noch einiges erleben kann. Sei es einen Jogging-Runde entlang der Küste, ein schneller Fußweg zum Strand oder mit dem Auto in 20 Minuten an verschiedenen Stellen, wie Santanyi oder Cala Figuera. Die Küche ist ebenfalls gut ausgestattet. Daniel hat sich öfter nach unserem Befinden erkundigt und war super hilfreich. Obwohl wir Pech mit dem Wetter hatten, wird diese Zeit uns in sehr positiver Erinnerung bleiben und wir werden gerne wieder kommen!
private_feedback: We had a wonderful time at your apartment! Thanks for you flexibility and quick response! We will come back for better weather 😅

comment: Die Wohnung von Daniel war super, es hat uns an nichts gefehlt. Eine kleine Küche mit allem, was man braucht. Ein Supermarkt, der zu Fuß erreichbar ist. Immer ein Parkplatz vorm Haus verfügbar. Daniel hat uns zu Anfang gute Tipps für Mallorca gegeben und sich erkundigt, ob alles passt.
private_feedback: Hola Daniel, gracias por todo.

comment: A great little place with a good location. The only down side was the Cockerell's waking us every morning around 7am. But we get up at that time anyway lol. Daniel was also a considerate host, allowing us to check out a few hours after we were meant to. I would go again.
private_feedback:
Hi Daniel, just wanted to say that we both banged our head on the glass shelf near the fridge. We thought it a little dangerous maybe!
Apart from that, Thank you for our stay.
John

comment: Everything was fine as expected…
***** star. Nice place !!
private_feedback: Nice host, nice place, nice apartment *****

comment: Schönes Appartement in ruhiger Lage mit allem was man braucht. Fußläufig ist ein Supermarkt zu erreichen. Wohnung ist gut ausgestattet. Wir haben uns wohl gefühlt :)

My stay at Daniel’s apartment was very nice. It has a very nice terrace, everything necessary for cooking and it was clean. The surroundings are great, very quiet place and ten minutes away from Es Trenc beach. I would for sure come back
fantastic apartment with excellent location.
private_feedback:
thanks again Daniel
take care and good luck

comment: Daniel was a great host and made checking in late after our flight was delayed easy. The apartment was clean, the bed was very comfortable, and the air conditioning worked well! We would definitely stay again.

Schöne kleine Wohnung .
Die Ausstattung der Küche und die Sauberkeit könnten ein wenig verbessert werden  um die volle Punktzahl zu erreichen.

Even if Daniel was remote all explanations and guidance are very well done to enjoy our stay.

Daniel is a good host
private_feedback: Thx even if remote entry and hosting is well done

comment: Très bon séjour. L'appartement est agréable, lumineux et la terrasse sans vis-à-vis. La cuisine est bien équipée et la wifi fonctionne très bien. En juin, grande facilité pour se garer devant la résidence. Tout peut se faire à pied, même les plages en 15-20 minutes. Seul, le concert de coqs chaque nuit pourra peut-être gêner certains.
private_feedback: Acheter une nouvelle poêle.

comment:
From the day one till the last minute of our stay, everything was perfect. Daniel is also flexible with check in and out hours. 
All you need is in the house, even the umbrella for the beach. The location of the house is really nice, you will be very close to the best beaches ( we visited also the north but we like most Es Trenc) and you will be 40 mins away from Palma (by car). As a couple, we had really nice stay in Colonia de Sant Jordi, highly recommended. Thanks again Daniel for all :)

Another huge highlight for me was realizing that in the rural area before the flat there are wild roosters and hens living as little families - this was such a special experience and lots of tourists would stop and take photos of the little baby chicks (keeping distance of course in order not to disturb them). I have never seen something similar. They are completely wild and have made that area their home (together with a colony of stray cats). I personally didn’t find the roosters calling in the morning to be a disturbance at all, but I guess if someone has a really light sleep, they might want to use the earplugs that Dani has kindly put out.

Parkplatz war kein Problem, direkt vor dem Haus (wir waren im Winter hier). Supermarkt direkt um die Ecke. Gut ausgestattete Küche, schönes Wohnzimmer mit Balkon. Sauber und gemütlich. Die Kommunikation mit dem Gastgeber verlief reibungslos.

Logement conforme à l’annonce. 
Très propre et agréable. 
Les instructions d’accès étaient très claires. 
Les nuits sont effectivement perturbées par le chant des coqs, cependant grâce aux bouchons anti bruit mis à disposition par l’hôte, le calme est garanti .

Bonsoir, 
Je tenais juste à vous signaler que la chasse d’eau des toilettes fuit et entraîne malheureusement une perte d’eau. 
Merci pour votre logement.

comment: Daniel is very friendly and caring, the flat is nice and cozy, there is everything you need
private_feedback:

comment:

In the neighbouring streets you'll find a lot of cats and some roosters that hang around. 😀 it's not far to the beaches and the supermarkets, everything is within walking distance. The famous Es Trenc beaches can be reached by foot.
the apartment was clean and tidy with a well sorted kitchen. Thank you Daniel!

comment: Für das Geld ist eine gute Wohnung, alles ist da.

War alles perfekt.
Reibungsloser Ablauf. Preis - Leistung Top. Danke

Sehr unkomplizierte Kommunikation für das Ein- und Auschecken. Gerne wieder.

hola Daniel,
